allow: Bash(mkdir -p lib/types lib/stores lib/engine/effects lib/preview lib/utils)
Bash(mkdir -p components/layout components/upload components/settings components/editor components/preview components/export)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);if(!j.tool_input.command.startsWith('git commit'))process.exit(0);const p=require('./package.json');const[M,m]=p.version.split('.').map(Number);p.version=M+'.'+(m+1)+'.0';require('fs').writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n');console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'Version bumped to '+p.version+'. Remember to stage and commit package.json with the version bump.'}}))})"
